string.text: %c[255,0,255,0]Savan, swing by when you're nearby — I've got something for you.
%c[255,255,128,128]How's it going, radioactive meat? You have one more day to get the money, or you know what happens.
%c[255,255,128,128]Where’s the money you promised? Fine, I’ll give you 12 more hours — if you don’t make it, that’s on you!
%c[255,255,128,128]Your time’s up. We fed your buddy to the dogs, and you won’t be running much longer either.
%c[255,0,255,0]Hey Savan, still need some cash? I’ve got a job just for you — swing by and I’ll tell you what’s what.
%c[255,0,255,0]It’s me again. I need your help — you know where to find me.
%c[255,0,255,0]Drop by if you want — I’ll always have work for you…
%c[255,255,128,128]Well, well! Look who’s rolling into our turf! You’re on my crew’s territory, drifter. Come over and let’s talk. Might even have a job for you — for the good of the brotherhood.
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, I’ve got serious work for you. Waiting.
%c[255,0,255,0]Ready or not? Get over here — time’s ticking.
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, keep up!
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, when you’re free, find me — we need to talk.
%c[255,0,255,0]Where the hell did you go?! Get over here, quick — I’m in the Rookie Village, waiting for you.
%c[255,0,255,0]Don’t worry, Savan — we’re gonna get you out.
%c[255,255,128,128]You moron, couldn’t even handle a simple job!
%c[255,0,255,0]Keep up, Savan!
%c[255,0,255,0]We need to stick together!
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, great news — through my contacts, I got the master access code to the lab. Here it is: 7200
%c[255,0,255,0]Hey Savan, I’m ready to welcome you into our ranks.
%c[255,0,255,0]Where are you going? Wait up!
%c[255,0,255,0]Wow! Some guide you turned out to be.
%c[255,0,255,0]Hey Savan, I heard you’re looking to make some cash. Come over and we’ll talk — I might have just the right gig for you.
%c[255,0,255,0]Need money? Come by — I’ve got the perfect job for you.
%c[255,0,255,0]Buying any weapons in any condition for parts. Good price guaranteed!
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan! We need to stick together!
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan! Hurry up! Or we’re dead!

%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, how are you? Still alive? Not a word from you — no news, no bones! I’ve been told you're already in the Bar. If you found anything interesting... like the X5 lab documents I asked for, bring them to the Barman. And ask him about that very artifact — he’s got useful info.
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, how are you? Still alive? Not a word from you — no news, no bones! I’ve already received word from the checkpoint at the Garbage...
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, I’ve got a job for you — remember? Come over and we’ll talk.
5h 12m have passed.
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, time’s up. It’s time to make a decision. If you're ready, come talk.
%c[255,0,255,0]Savan, the time has come. Head to the checkpoint and speak to the guard commander — he’ll brief you on what’s next.
%c[255,0,255,0]Hey stalker, want to earn some cash? Come see me. I’m at the Duty base.
%c[255,0,255,0]You can try your luck in the Arena — just be careful.
%c[255,0,255,0]Still alive? Changed your mind? Before heading underground, drop by — I’ve got something for the road.
%c[255,255,128,128]Attention all fighters! The main SPECTRUM forces are on the central square. We attack from the front. Savan, cover the flank. That’s an order.
%c[255,255,128,128]Savan, get closer to the APC, you’re too far — the detonator won’t work.
%c[255,255,128,128]Those bastards launched a chopper. Savan, get to the rooftop — don’t let them escape!
%c[255,255,128,128]You let them get away!!!
%c[255,255,128,128]Attention! Combat helicopter detected — approaching the square. Savan, take it out. My men will cover the evacuation.
%c[255,255,128,128]Everyone, storm the Culture House! Mercenaries and SPECTRUM leaders are holed up there. No prisoners!
%c[255,255,128,128]Savan, check the second floor!
%c[255,255,128,128]Savan, check the basement!
%c[255,255,128,128]Savan, do you have the case? Bring it to me. Now!
%c[255,255,128,128]What the hell are you up to, bastard?! You're dead! Attention all units — I order you to eliminate the traitor!
12h 08m have passed.
